'''Druidic Ritual''' is a novice [[quest]] that serves as the introduction to the [[Herblore]] [[skill]]. It takes place entirely in the vicinity of [[Taverley]] and is a fairly short quest.

==Details==
{{Quest details
|start = Speak to [[Kaqemeex]] in the stone circle north of [[Taverley]].
|startmap = 2926,3484
|difficulty = Novice
|description = The Druids north of Taverley need help making a potion to reclaim the stone circle south of Varrock.
|length = Very Short
|items = 
*[[Raw bear meat]]
*[[Raw rat meat]]
*[[Raw beef]]
*[[Raw chicken]]
|recommended = 
*{{SCP|Combat|10|link=yes}}
|kills = [[Suit of armour]] (level 19) (can be avoided)
|ironman =
|leagueRegion = <poem>
Unlocking {{LeagueRegion|Varlamore}} {{okay}} will auto-complete the quest
</poem>
}}

==Walkthrough==
===The stone circle===
[[File:Druidic Ritual - Kaqemeex.png|thumb|220px|Speaking to [[Kaqemeex]].]]
{{Needed|recommended=To save time, bring [[raw rat meat]], [[raw bear meat]], [[raw beef]] and [[raw chicken]]. You can read the subsequent section for advice on gathering these.}}
[[File:Kaqemeex chathead.png|left]]
Head to the stone circle on the hill just north of [[Taverley]], immediately east of the road to [[Burthorpe]]. Talk to [[Kaqemeex]] and tell him you are in search of a quest. He will mention that the stone circle south of [[Varrock]] used to belong to the druids of [[Guthix]], but the [[dark wizards]] have cursed the rocks. They are in need of an adventurer to help purify the circle. He asks you to speak to [[Sanfew]], who is working on a purification ritual.

Sanfew can be found to the south, upstairs in the big octagonal [[Herblore shops|Herblore shop]] marked with a herb. Tell him that you were sent to help, and Sanfew will request [[raw rat meat]], [[raw bear meat]], [[raw beef]] and [[raw chicken]], to be dipped in the [[Cauldron of Thunder]] for the ritual.

===Acquiring the meat===
:''Skip this section if you already have the meat.''
[[File:Raw beef detail.png|left|70px|frameless]]
These meats can all be bought on the [[Grand Exchange]], or purchased at [[Rufus' Meat Emporium]] in [[Canifis]] after the completion of {{SCP|Quest}} [[Priest in Peril]]. 

If obtaining the meat by killing the animals, [[Lands End]] in [[Great Kourend]] has a [[bear]], [[chicken]] and [[rat]] in close vicinity. You can reach the area via [[Veos]] in [[Port Sarim]] after the completion of {{SCP|Quest}} [[X Marks the Spot]]. The [[cow]] can be killed in the [[Lumbridge pasture]]. 

Alternately, there is the [[bear]] near the building just west of [[Ice Mountain]], the [[chicken]] and [[cow]] at the farm just south-east of [[Falador]], and the [[giant rat]] near the graveyard just north of the church below [[Port Sarim]].

===Enchanting the meat===
[[File:Cauldron of Thunder location.png|frame|left|[[Cauldron of Thunder]] location.]]
[[File:Druidic Ritual - Cauldron of Thunder.png|thumb|220px|Enchanting the meats.]]
{{Needed|[[Raw bear meat]], [[Raw rat meat]], [[Raw chicken]] and [[Raw beef]]|recommended=[[Food]] for low levels}}
The [[Cauldron of Thunder]] is located in [[Taverley Dungeon]]. Head south of [[Taverley]] and down the ladder. Head north, past the level 22 and level 25 [[skeleton]]s until you see a gate to the east, with two level 19 [[Suit of armour|suits of armour]] on either side. Try to open the gate and they will attack you (regardless of combat level). Either kill them, or simply continue to click on the gate until it opens. Enchant the meat by using each piece on the [[Cauldron of Thunder]] inside the room, and you will notice they will turn blue.

Once you have enchanted all four meats, return to [[Sanfew]], who will take them and thank the player for bringing the druids one step closer to reclaiming their stone circle. He then asks the player to speak again to [[Kaqemeex]]. Return to Kaqemeex, who will teach the player the basics of the [[Herblore]] skill.

'''Congratulations, quest complete!'''

==Required for completing==
Completion of Druidic Ritual is required for the following:
*[[A Kingdom Divided]]
*[[A Taste of Hope]]
*[[Barbarian Herblore]]
*[[Eadgar's Ruse]]
*[[Fairytale II - Cure a Queen]]
*[[Grim Tales]]
*[[Heroes' Quest]]
*[[Jungle Potion]]
*[[Recruitment Drive]]
*[[Shades of Mort'ton]]
*[[Song of the Elves]]
*[[The Dig Site]]
*[[Watchtower]]
